fields.description:
Choose the built-in printer font for this label element. Fonts are identified by numbers or names and differ in size and style.

Common Font Options:

0 — Very small (8×12 dots)

1 — Small, narrow (8×16 dots)

2 — Medium thin (12×20 dots)

3 — Standard readable (12×24 dots) ✅ Recommended

4 — Medium-large (16×32 dots)

5 — Large, bold (24×32 dots)

6 — Very large (32×48 dots)

7 — OCR A font (14×19 dots)

8 — OCR B font (14×25 dots)

TSS24.BF2 — Scalable font (TrueType, if supported by printer)

🖨️ Font sizes are fixed unless you apply scaling using X and Y multipliers in the layout settings.

ℹ️ Not all fonts are supported on every printer model. Use font 3 for general-purpose labels.
fields.label: Font Size
fields.options:
0 - Very small (8x12)
1 - Small (8x16)
2 - Medium thin (12x20)
3 - Standard readable (12x24)
4 - Medium-large (16x32)
5 - Large bold (24x32)
6 - Very large (32x48)
7 - OCR A (14x19)
8 - OCR B (14x25)
